name: xcode
description: Local-first Xcode workflows with fast builds, IDE automation, simulators, result bundles, diagnostics, and optional native Xcode state sensing.

interface.shortDescription: Build, test, inspect, and automate local Xcode projects with Apple tools
interface.longDescription: Local-first Xcode workflows for Codex. Provides a stable bin/xcode dispatcher, shared-cache xcodebuild validation, Xcode IDE automation through AppleScript/JXA, optional native macOS Xcode state sensing through a Swift helper, simulator lifecycle commands through simctl, xcresulttool result summaries, warning parsing, read-only context inspection, packaging validation, and environment diagnostics. The plugin does not depend on XcodeBuildMCP, and Apple's mcpbridge is treated as optional.
defaultPrompt: Build and test this Xcode project with shared caches
Diagnose my local Xcode and simulator setup
Inspect native Xcode app state and Accessibility readiness
